mac: F5 starts debugging. ⇧+F5 stops it. ⇧+⌘+F5 restarts. The holy trinity.
windows: F5 starts debugging. Shift+F5 stops it. Ctrl+Shift+F5 restarts. The holy trinity.
linux: F5 starts debugging. Shift+F5 stops it. Ctrl+Shift+F5 restarts. The holy trinity.

mac: F9 toggles a breakpoint on the current line. You can also click the gutter.
windows: F9 toggles a breakpoint on the current line. You can also click the gutter.
linux: F9 toggles a breakpoint on the current line. You can also click the gutter.

mac: F10 steps over. F11 steps into. ⇧+F11 steps out. Master the debug dance.
windows: F10 steps over. F11 steps into. Shift+F11 steps out. Master the debug dance.
linux: F10 steps over. F11 steps into. Shift+F11 steps out. Master the debug dance.

mac: Logpoints log to the console without pausing execution. Right-click the gutter to add one.
windows: Logpoints log to the console without pausing execution. Right-click the gutter to add one.
linux: Logpoints log to the console without pausing execution. Right-click the gutter to add one.

mac: Conditional breakpoints only pause when an expression is true. Right-click a breakpoint to set one.
windows: Conditional breakpoints only pause when an expression is true. Right-click a breakpoint to set one.
linux: Conditional breakpoints only pause when an expression is true. Right-click a breakpoint to set one.

mac: Hover over any variable while debugging to inspect its value inline.
windows: Hover over any variable while debugging to inspect its value inline.
linux: Hover over any variable while debugging to inspect its value inline.

mac: ⇧+⌘+D opens Run and Debug. Set up launch.json for custom debug configurations.
windows: Ctrl+Shift+D opens Run and Debug. Set up launch.json for custom debug configurations.
linux: Ctrl+Shift+D opens Run and Debug. Set up launch.json for custom debug configurations.
